description: General-purpose spiking neural network agent. Supports two modes: (1) binary I/O with R-STDP learning via UDP, and (2) electrode mode — real-time intracranial signal processing derived from ANNet (MB2018), producing a closed-loop control signal for experiment hardware. LIF neurons, STDP learning, temporal receptive field encoding, attention neuron gating. Configurable via config.py.
goals: Serve as a reusable intelligent agent primitive
Accept arbitrary binary data streams as input via UDP (binary mode)
Accept raw electrode samples at 80 kHz via UDP (electrode mode)
Emit a real-time control signal for closed-loop experiments (≤5 ms latency)
Learn neural spike waveform templates via unsupervised STDP
Gate noise via an attention neuron (synaptic depression activity detector)
Provide live spike raster visualisation in the browser
Remain minimal, dependency-light, and easy to maintain

config.role: All tunable parameters — mode selection, network topology, encoding, STDP, control decoder, ports

network.role: NumPy LIF neurons: Network (binary R-STDP) + TemplateLayer (electrode STDP + WTA)

encoder.role: SpikeEncoder (temporal receptive field) + AttentionNeuron (LIF with synaptic depression)

decoder.role: ControlDecoder — converts L1 spikes to control signal (rate / population / trigger)

server.role: asyncio: UDP input, UDP control output, WebSocket viz, HTTP static files. Dual mode.

frontend.role: Canvas 2D spike raster, vanilla JS, reward/punish buttons

test_bin.role: Utility: send test UDP binary frames to a running agent (binary mode)

test_elec.role: Utility: send synthetic electrode signal via UDP (electrode mode)

arch.role: Machine-readable architecture plan derived from ANNet MATLAB package

extension_points.classification: L2 ClassificationLayer (ANNet output layer) — planned, not yet implemented

optimization.description: Automated hyperparameter search using Optuna TPE sampler against SpikeInterface ground-truth recordings.
optimization.objective: maximize mean accuracy across ground-truth units
